title: UI/UX - Verify screen layout on device rotation (OTP Screen)
description: Checks for UI breakages or layout issues on the OTP screen during device rotation.
preconditions: User is on the OTP screen.

steps.description: 1. On the OTP screen, rotate the device to landscape mode.
2. Verify all UI elements are visible and not overlapping.
3. Rotate the device back to portrait mode.
4. Verify the layout returns to its original state without issues.

expected_result: The OTP screen layout adapts correctly to both portrait and landscape orientations without any visual glitches.
